name: FeatureFlagDefinition
description: The full definition of a Split feature flag in a specific environment, including treatments, targeting rules, and rollout configuration.

fields.name: environment
fields.description: Reference to the environment where this definition applies.

fields.name: killed
fields.description: When true, all evaluations return the default treatment regardless of targeting rules.

fields.name: treatments
fields.description: List of possible treatments this flag can return.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Treatment name (e.g., on, off, v1, v2).

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of what this treatment does.

fields.name: configurations
fields.description: JSON string of dynamic configuration for this treatment.

fields.name: defaultTreatment
fields.description: Treatment returned when no rules match or the flag is killed.

fields.name: rules
fields.description: Ordered list of targeting rules evaluated top to bottom.

fields.name: condition
fields.description: Condition that must be satisfied for this rule to apply.

fields.name: buckets
fields.description: Percentage distribution of treatments for matching traffic.

fields.name: defaultRule
fields.description: Percentage-based rollout applied when no targeting rules match.

fields.name: trafficAllocation
fields.description: Percentage of traffic included in flag evaluation (0-100).
